message:
test(fwc): expand supply_chain_cmd, policy_cmd, and template test suites

supply_chain_cmd: 41 → 91 tests (+50) — camel_to_snake_case edge cases,
verification_decision_label, build_verification_policy, VerifyArgs/
ReportArgs coverage, VerifyOutput serialization, SupplyChainEvaluation
clone/debug, evaluate_supply_chain paths, read_attestation/sbom errors.

policy_cmd: 48 → 118 tests (+70) — PolicyBundleState validation and
transitions, audit events, diff_zone_policy edge cases, diff_json_objects,
parse_policy_document/bundle_object, load/write_bundle_state, apply/
rollback integration, transport_policy risk flags.

template: 55 → 113 tests (+58) — schema types, placeholder variations,
enum edge cases, default/example values, fill argument parsing, nested
structures, required_only interactions, serialization roundtrips,
combined scenarios with all features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
